block_01: We are pleased to announce that we’ve enabled Margin Trading in your IQ Option trading account. The new trading instrument is available on all our platforms — desktop, web browser, and mobile applications. To activate Margin Trading, please, follow the instructions below:
block_04: To activate Margin Trading on the desktop application and web browser, simply click ’Enable’ in the balance section of the traderoom.
block_06: To activate Margin Trading on mobile, you need to update the app. Once you open the app, a "Margin Trading" popup will show up. Click on the "Enable" button to activate the feature. You can also switch on Margin Trading in the balance selector.
block_10: Control larger positions with margins starting from 0.33%
